description: Unified session-level orchestration, prompt diet, drop TDD, auto-detect mode, .diff review file

userStories.title: Create unified orchestrator prompt (run.md)
userStories.description: As the session agent, I want a single orchestrator file that handles both sequential and parallel execution so I don't need separate solo/team modes.
acceptanceCriteria: A new lib/run.md replaces both lib/solo.md and lib/team-lead.md — single flat document addressed to the session agent
When stories.json has no waves or all waves have 1 story: execute sequentially; when waves have 2+ stories: use TeamCreate with worktree isolation
All phases present in order: story loop, scenario verification, code review, PR creation, auto-retro, completion

userStories.title: Implement lean agent prompts with .diff review file
userStories.description: As the session agent, I want to spawn workers/verifiers/reviewers with minimal pointer-based prompts and use .takt/review.diff for code review communication.
acceptanceCriteria: Worker prompts contain only: story JSON + project path + pointer to worker.md — under 1KB total
Verifier and reviewer prompts follow the same pointer pattern — reviewer reads .takt/review.diff (unified diff format) instead of running git diff
Session agent writes git diff to .takt/review.diff before review, re-generates between fix cycles, retro cleans it up

userStories.title: Update worker.md — file-edit-only scope, drop TDD
userStories.description: As a worker agent, I want clear instructions that my job is file edits only, with BDD scenarios as the quality gate.
acceptanceCriteria: worker.md git section replaced with: 'Do NOT run git commands — the session agent handles all git operations'
TDD workflow (RED/GREEN/REFACTOR) removed — workers implement directly, BDD scenarios are the verification layer
The /takt converter (commands/takt.md) story type section simplified to reflect no TDD enforcement at worker level

userStories.title: Update CLAUDE.md, install.sh, and routing for 'start takt'
userStories.description: As a takt user, I want the documentation, installer, and routing to reflect the unified 'start takt' command and run.md.
acceptanceCriteria: CLAUDE.md routing table updated: 'start takt' maps to run.md, 'takt solo' and 'takt team' are deprecated aliases
install.sh updated: installs run.md, removes solo.md and team-lead.md from install targets
Global CLAUDE.md instructions (~/.claude/CLAUDE.md takt section) updated to reflect 'start takt' as the primary command
